side_effects.description: Dyskinesia that would not stop for approximately 1.5 weeks after switching from reta to tirz; involved significant vomiting and extreme pain; required hospitalization
Extreme vomiting associated with dyskinesia episode after switching to tirz
Dysesthesia - skin felt like it was on fire, extreme hot/cold sensations, had to stand in shower to feel normal temperature
Could not eat for over a week after switching to tirz

protocol_notes: Was on reta with no issues. After switching to tirz (abrupt switch implied), developed dyskinesia, extreme vomiting, dysesthesia, and inability to eat for over a week. Required hospitalization. All resolved. Warns others to be careful when switching from reta to tirz.
